scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:worker
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.lint: cd frontend && npm run lint && cd ../backend && npm run lint
